metadata.description: Data-layer safety + truth verifier MCP server + 5 shipped skills for AI coding agents.

plugins.name: rolepod-dblab
plugins.description: 5 MCP tools + 5 skills. Introspect schema, assert DB state as verify-evidence, EXPLAIN plans, detect schema drift (SQLAlchemy vs live), and mutate data behind a transaction preview→confirm→commit/rollback guard. Postgres-only in v1.
